accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

accommodations.text: Provide a copy of teacher notes.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a copy of teacher notes

accommodations.text: Provide graphic organizers for writing and note-taking.
accommodations.source_quote: graphic organizers for writing and note-taking

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on all classroom tests and quizzes.
accommodations.source_quote: 50% extended time on all classroom tests and quizzes

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction 50 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly
Language processing support group 30 minutes twice weekly; provider TBD

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Diego will write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes a paragraph with a topic sentence in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Aanya will write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence and correct capitalization in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes two related sentences with inconsistent capitalization.
goals.target: Five-sentence paragraph with topic sentence in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end
